### Tier 2 — Strip known structural tokens (lines 349–354)
If no quoted string is found, the code strips away all known non-prompt tokens from `cmd`:
**The prompt extraction is correct and complete.** For the standard format `golem --provider X "full prompt here"`, it captures the entire quoted prompt verbatim. For unquoted prompts, it surgically removes only the known CLI structural tokens (`golem`, `[t-...]`, `--provider`, `--max-turns`) and returns the remaining text as the prompt.
